item.voyager.pion.desc: Received from the Pion Gym Leader.
item.voyager.gemini.desc: Received from the Gemini Gym Leaders.
item.voyager.antares.desc: Received from the Antares Gym Leader.
item.voyager.andromeda.desc: Received from the Andromeda Gym Leader.
item.voyager.artifact.desc: A strange and unknown artifact. Seems harmless...
item.voyager.link_tunelamento.desc: A device that allows crossing stable rifts. Given by Harpy.
item.voyager.anti_radiation_suit.desc: Protects against Sector Zero radiation. Crafted by Elias.
npc.redwood.name: Professor Redwood
npc.dax.name: Rival Dax
npc.joy.name: Nurse Joy
npc.ellie.name: Nurse Ellie
npc.vance.name: Captain Vance
npc.harpy.name: Independent Researcher Harpy
npc.hypnosgrunt.name: Team Hypnos Agent
npc.lyra.name: Team Hypnos Architect Lyra
npc.elias.name: Elias the Scrapper
dialogue.voyager.dax_initial_chat.meetin: You don't seem like much. I think Prof. Redwood is losing his touch for recognizing talent if you're the best the Academy has to offer.
Who are you to talk like that?
The Professor trusts me. That's what matters.
dialogue.voyager.dax_initial_chat.dax_id: I'm Dax, from Keitai's Containment Unit. I don't play trainer — I neutralize Ultra Void threats.
But fine, I'll do you a favor and give you the privilege of testing your 'skills' against a real professional!
dialogue.voyager.dax_reencounter.chat_lo: Haven't learned your lesson yet? Go home and quit the academy.
You have no talent for this.
I'm stronger now. I won't lose to anyone again!
dialogue.voyager.dax_reencounter.chat_wo: That victory must have gone to your head if you think you still deserve that license.
Return it to the professor and leave the academy quietly. Pathetic loser.
Big talk from someone who suffered an even bigger defeat!
Then I guess I'll have to prove it to you again, because I have the license.
dialogue.voyager.dax_reencounter.part2.l: Urgh... People like you who don't know their place are the most infuriating!
This time I'll crush your spirit so you give up once and for all!
dialogue.voyager.elias_chat.first_meetin: I'm Elias. I used to fix the generators that keep these islands afloat. Now I live off what's left of them.
You didn't come here to chat. You came looking for answers the Academy won't give.
How do you know about Harpy?
I need help with radiation. Is there anything useful?
dialogue.voyager.elias_chat.sector_expla: This is Sector Zero. Where the Foundation dumps everything it can't explain or fix.
Radioactive scrap, failed prototypes, Pokémon bodies that couldn't survive the tests... and rifts that nobody admits exist.
Down here, Redstone has no power. It's the only place where the universe can still breathe.
Does the Foundation know all this?
Can you help me survive down here?
dialogue.voyager.elias_chat.foundation_t: They know. They just pretend they don't. Sector Zero is the price of their progress.
They call it 'inevitable waste'. I call it truth.
dialogue.voyager.elias_chat.harpy_questi: Harpy? She doesn't work for anyone. Not the Foundation, not Hypnos.
She just... watches. And sometimes helps those caught in the crossfire.
You're in the middle now. Be careful.
dialogue.voyager.elias_chat.anti_rad_sui: Down here, radiation drains your Pokémon's HP outside of battle. Without protection, you won't last 10 minutes.
I have something left over from an old prototype. It's not pretty, but it works.
Thank you. Maybe I'll come back later.
dialogue.voyager.elias_chat.farewell.lin: Use it carefully. And don't trust anyone down here... not even me.
Come back whenever you want. Or when you need to.
You came back. Sector Zero hasn't killed you yet... good sign.
Need something? Or just came to see if I'm still alive?
dialogue.voyager.elias_chat.reencounter_: I have some spare parts. I can upgrade your suit or fix something you brought.
But it'll cost scrap or time. What do you have?
dialogue.voyager.elias_main.greeting.lin: So... you managed to get down here using the Link.
I'm Elias. I used to build the machines that now imprison us. Now I live among the waste they leave behind.
dialogue.voyager.elias_main.sector_expla: Sector Zero is where the Foundation dumps everything it can't explain.
Here the rifts form without control. And here you'll need this...
dialogue.voyager.elias_main.post_give.li: This suit will protect you as you explore deeper.
Beware of the anomalies. They grow larger the deeper you go into the Zero.
dialogue.voyager.elias_main.return.line1: You came back. The Zero changes people... or reveals what was always there.
dialogue.voyager.elias_main.return.line2: What are you looking for this time?
dialogue.voyager.ellie_chat.greeting.lin: Hello! You can call me Nurse Ellie, or just Ellie as many do!
dialogue.voyager.ellie_chat.no_healer.li: I would offer to heal your Pokémon, but I can't seem to find my healing machine...
I would offer to heal your Pokémon for you, but your Pokémon are completely healthy!
dialogue.voyager.ellie_chat.no_charge.li: I'd like to heal your Pokémon but my machine is busy! Please come back later!
dialogue.voyager.ellie_chat.has_charge.l: Would you like me to heal your Pokémon?
dialogue.voyager.fenda_moral_choice.fend: The great rift has opened. Now you must choose.
Seal it with the Foundation... or stabilize it with Hypnos.
There is no right answer. There is only the one you can live with.
dialogue.voyager.harpy_first_contact.fir: Don't be startled. I see what others hide. My name is Harpy. And you're the cadet who's disrupting the balance without even realizing it.
How do you know about the books?
What do you want from me?
dialogue.voyager.harpy_first_contact.har: I don't read books... I read the rifts they leave in the fabric of reality.
The Foundation wants to seal everything. Hypnos wants to open everything. And you're in the middle, holding both keys.
Sector Zero is calling. Down there, where Redstone's waste becomes truth, are answers neither side wants you to see.
dialogue.voyager.harpy_first_contact.sec: Where the Foundation dumps what it can't explain. Scrap, failures, bodies... and rifts that shouldn't exist.
Take this. It's called a Tunnel Link. It will show you paths that others can't see.
Use it carefully. Some paths don't lead back.
dialogue.voyager.harpy_first_contact.tru: You don't need to trust me. You need to trust your own doubt.
Read the books you carry. Then go down. Sector Zero doesn't lie.
dialogue.voyager.harpy_first_contact.far: When the silence of Redstone starts to weigh on you... come find me down below.
dialogue.voyager.harpy_first_contact.sec: You came back. Or rather... you went down.
Has what you saw down there already changed something in you?
dialogue.voyager.harpy_main.first_contac: You're carrying two books now... one of iron, one of ashes.
I see what others hide. My name is Harpy.
How do you know about the books?
dialogue.voyager.harpy_main.harpy_knowle: I read the rifts before they open.
Sector Zero is calling. Down there lies the truth that the Foundation and Hypnos want to hide.
Take this. It will show you paths no one else can see.
dialogue.voyager.harpy_main.return.line1: You're here again. Sector Zero changes those who go down.
dialogue.voyager.harpy_main.return.line2: Go deep. The answer isn't on the surface.
dialogue.voyager.harpy_main.fenda_choice: The Balance Rift has opened. Now you must choose.
Seal it with the Foundation... or stabilize it with Hypnos.
dialogue.voyager.hypnosgrunt_chat.confro: Stop right there, cadet! You're in Team Hypnos territory.
Team Hypnos will open the rifts that the Foundation tries so hard to hide. And you won't stop us!
I won't let you do this!
What do you want with the rifts?
dialogue.voyager.hypnosgrunt_chat.hypnos: What do we want? We want what the Foundation stole from all of us! The power of the Ultra Void!
Enough talk. Prove you're worthy to face us!
dialogue.voyager.hypnosgrunt_chat.battle: Go, my Pokémon! Show this cadet the power of Team Hypnos!
dialogue.voyager.hypnosgrunt_chat.reenco: You again... Team Hypnos won't stop because of a single cadet.
dialogue.voyager.joy_chat.greeting.line1: Hello! You can call me nurse Joy as many do!
dialogue.voyager.joy_chat.no_healer.line: I would offer to heal your Pokémon, but I can't seem to find my healing machine...
dialogue.voyager.joy_chat.full_health.li: I would offer to heal your Pokémon for you, but your Pokémon are completely healthy!
dialogue.voyager.joy_chat.no_charge.line: I'd like to heal your Pokémon but my machine is busy! Please come back later!
dialogue.voyager.joy_chat.has_charge.lin: Would you like me to heal your Pokémon?
dialogue.voyager.lyra_chat01.meeting.lin: Professor Redwood and the Academy teach you to 'contain' and 'catalog'. But they never taught you to ask for forgiveness, did they?
dialogue.voyager.lyra_chat01.artifact_pl: Who are you? I'm looking for a certain item. I don't have time to talk.
dialogue.voyager.lyra_chat01.artifact_ly: Ah yes, another brainless soldier. I thought you might have your own thoughts. You came for the artifact detected by the ULTRA-SCANNER, right?
I have it, and I can do you the favor of delivering it. But only if you hear me out first.
dialogue.voyager.lyra_chat01.lyra_introd: My name is Lyra. What you call 'progress', I call a scar. Every rift that opens in Keitai's sky is not an accident... it's the universe trying to breathe through the asphalt you imposed.
The Ultra Beasts you hunt as monsters... they are merely the antibodies of a reality we are infecting.
dialogue.voyager.lyra_chat01.philosophy_: No... I see it in your eyes. You're still a prisoner of order. Let me show you the beauty that exists in the chaos of the subconscious.
I won't betray the professor! Hand over the artifact! [Battle]
dialogue.voyager.lyra_chat01.post_battle: But a promise is a debt. And I keep my promises, unlike the Foundation.
dialogue.voyager.lyra_chat01.goodbye.lin: Still here? You came for the artifact, right?
I already gave it to you. Now you can go back to playing soldier...
dialogue.voyager.lyra_chat02.meeting.lin: Professor Redwood and the Academy teach you to 'contain' and 'catalog'. But they never taught you to ask for forgiveness, did they?
dialogue.voyager.lyra_chat02.artifact_pl: Who are you? I'm looking for a certain item. I don't have time to talk.
dialogue.voyager.lyra_chat02.artifact_ly: Ah yes, another brainless soldier. I thought you might have your own thoughts. You came for the artifact detected by the ULTRA-SCANNER, right?
I have it, and I can do you the favor of delivering it. But only if you hear me out first.
dialogue.voyager.lyra_chat02.lyra_introd: My name is Lyra. What you call 'progress', I call a scar. Every rift that opens in Keitai's sky is not an accident... it's the universe trying to breathe through the asphalt you imposed.
The Ultra Beasts you hunt as monsters... they are merely the antibodies of a reality we are infecting.
dialogue.voyager.lyra_chat02.philosophy_: No... I see it in your eyes. You're still a prisoner of order. Let me show you the beauty that exists in the chaos of the subconscious.
I won't betray the professor! Hand over the artifact! [Battle]
dialogue.voyager.lyra_chat02.post_battle: But a promise is a debt. And I keep my promises, unlike the Foundation.
dialogue.voyager.lyra_chat02.goodbye.lin: Still here? You came for the artifact, right?
I already gave it to you. Now you can go back to playing soldier...
dialogue.voyager.lyra_main.greeting.line: You... I know you from somewhere?
dialogue.voyager.nurse_healed.greeting.l: Your Pokémon appear to be in top shape!
dialogue.voyager.redwood_chapter2_licenc: Here you go, Cadet. Your Trainer License and your Badge Box.
You are now officially a representative of the Keitai Academy on the surface.
Thank you, Professor. What's my next objective?
Head to Route 1. There are reports of magnetic distortions near the first Gym.
But be careful... Dax, the cadet from the Containment Unit, was also sent there.
He's competitive and doesn't like being outperformed. He'll be watching your progress.
dialogue.voyager.redwood_chat.crash_land: Our equipment is scattered across the blocks of this cave and the local fauna seems to have been affected by Ultra-Space radiation. They're extremely aggressive!
dialogue.voyager.redwood_chat.give_quest: I'm still processing the data, but we're below Keitai's main network. Take this Ultra-Scanner; it will monitor your goals and detect Ultra-Rift signatures.
I need you to clear the perimeter of this cave by battling the hostile Pokémon while I try to reactivate the teleport signal.
It's tuned to the Voyager Foundation frequencies. Once you defeat the local anomalies, it will update our status automatically.
Take it and let's get to work, we don't have much time.
Take the device, it will be our guide.
dialogue.voyager.redwood_chat.survival_t: Consult your Mission Journal frequently. We can only leave here when the Scanner confirms the area is clear.
dialogue.voyager.redwood_chat.ready_to_l: I managed to stabilize the teleport signal to the nearest Foundation Recovery Center. Shall we go?
dialogue.voyager.redwood_chat.arrival_at: And here we are. Nothing like the sound of a perfectly functioning Redstone Healing Station, is there? Regain your strength.
While you were in the cave, I processed your combat records and sent them to the Academy headquarters.
What did the Academy say about the incident?
The Re:Vive units are very efficient.
I feel like we're being watched...
dialogue.voyager.redwood_chat.the_licens: As one of the best students in our Keitai class, I decided not to wait for the formal process. By my powers as Voyager Foundation supervisor, here is your Official Trainer License.
And take this too: a Badge Box. It's made of a distortion-resistant alloy, perfect for storing the badges you'll earn in the League Challenge.
[Receive Items] It's an honor to represent the Academy.
The exam continues even with UBs active?
A Badge Box... The first step to becoming a Master.
dialogue.voyager.redwood_chat.post_licen: Make use of the Recovery Center facilities and prepare your team.
The Keitai region has many challenges ahead, but I fully trust in your abilities, Voyager.
dialogue.voyager.redwood_chat.intro_vanc: You'll be under his command and will carry out reconnaissance and anomaly patrol missions. He's somewhat strict so he'll probably want to test you.
Whatever he has in store, I'll be ready!
I hope I can handle him...
dialogue.voyager.redwood_intro.greetings: Hello! Welcome to the wonderful world of Pokémon!
Do you already know what Pokémon are?
dialogue.voyager.redwood_intro.explainin: This world is inhabited by wonderful creatures called POKÉMON!
For some people, POKÉMON are pets. Others use them for battles.
I... I study POKÉMON as a profession. First, what is your name?
dialogue.voyager.redwood_intro.rival_int: This is Dax! He's been your rival since you were babies!
dialogue.voyager.redwood_intro.good_luck: Your very own Pokémon legend is about to unfold!
A world of dreams and adventures awaits you! Let's go!
dialogue.voyager.redwood_start_cave.gree: Remember what happened? We were at the gym, then it all started shaking
Your father is injured, we need to find a way out quickly!
dialogue.voyager.vance_chat.greetings.li: At ease, Cadet. From now on you are one of the pillars protecting Keitai's citizens.
Your duties will be to escort items and patrol using the ULTRA-SCANNER.
dialogue.voyager.vance_chat.explaining.l: I WANT TO SEE WHAT YOU'RE CAPABLE OF THROUGH A BATTLE!
dialogue.voyager.vance_chat.good_luck.li: Let's see if you have the skill to back it up!
dialogue.voyager.vance_intro.greeting.li: Your first mission is to go to the coordinates indicated by the ULTRA-SCANNER and retrieve the object that is triggering the sensors.
dialogue.voyager.vance_intro.greeting.op: Understood. I won't fail this mission.
dialogue.voyager.vance_intro.challenge.l: Words are easy. Here on the frontier, what counts is the strength of your Pokémon partner and your strategy on the battlefield.
If you feel you need more training, I recommend participating in battles — your license will tell you who to face to get stronger.
dialogue.voyager.vance_intro.post_battle: Well done, I see you got the artifact. Was there anything on the way?
dialogue.voyager.vance_intro.revealed_tr: I met someone called Lyra. She had some strange ideas.
But I didn't listen and managed to get the artifact she had stolen!
dialogue.voyager.vance_intro.congrat_van: WHAT? I mean... Don't worry, I'll file a report about what happened.
For now, go back and try to train by battling some gym leaders!
dialogue.voyager.vance_intro.WIP.line1: The creator got tired after this — that's all for now, folks!
